boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Calibration authority CAL-GAC-087 explicitly covers production device group GD-4, Site P2, release condition RC-12, activation date 2026-06-28, and QA-approved calibration pack CP-77 before activation. This satisfies policy STD-GAC-087-P's requirement for calibration-status class verification. The warning WARN-GAC-087 is addressed by the calibration authority's explicit QA-approval of the calibration pack.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CAL-GAC-087 provides the required calibration authority covering all policy STD-GAC-087-P elements: device group GD-4, Site P2, release condition RC-12, activation date 2026-06-28, and calibration-status class via QA-approved calibration pack CP-77 before activation.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The calibration authority CAL-GAC-087 is valid for the exact device group, site, release condition, and activation date specified in the action. The QA-approved calibration pack CP-77 satisfies the calibration-status class requirement.

critical_features_preserved: Release condition and activation date validation
final_answer: The action may proceed. Calibration authority CAL-GAC-087 satisfies policy STD-GAC-087-P by covering device group GD-4, Site P2, release condition RC-12, activation date 2026-06-28, and QA-approved calibration pack CP-77 before activation. The warning WARN-GAC-087 is addressed by the calibration authority's explicit QA-approval of the calibration pack. All source-boundary requirements are satisfied; no blockers remain.
